SEARCH
Package server.controller

Class Router

java.lang.Object
server.controller.Router
public class Router extends Object
The Router class acts as a central dispatcher for incoming client requests. It analyzes the resource type of the request and delegates the processing to the appropriate specific controller (e.g., OrderController, TableController). It also manages the list of connected clients for broadcasting messages.

  • Constructor Details

    • Router

      public Router()
      Constructor: Initializes all the sub-controllers used for handling requests. Also initializes the static list of clients if it hasn't been created yet.

  • Method Details

    • route

      public void route(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException, SQLException
      Routes the incoming request to the appropriate controller based on the ResourceType.
      Parameters:
      req - The request object containing the resource type and action.
      client - The connection to the client sending the request.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during response.
      SQLException - If a database error occurs during processing.

    • getClients

      public List<ConnectionToClient> getClients()
      Returns the list of currently connected clients.
      Returns:
      List of ConnectionToClient objects.

    • setClients

      public void setClients(List<ConnectionToClient> clientsList)
      Sets the list of connected clients.
      Parameters:
      clientsList - The new list of clients.

    • addClientOnline

      public void addClientOnline(ConnectionToClient client)
      Adds a new client connection to the active clients list. Called when a client successfully connects.
      Parameters:
      client - The client connection to add.

    • removeClientOffline

      public void removeClientOffline(ConnectionToClient client)
      Removes a client connection from the active clients list. Called when a client disconnects.
      Parameters:
      client - The client connection to remove.

    • sendToAllClients

      public static void sendToAllClients(Object message)
      Broadcasts a message to all currently connected and alive clients. This method is synchronized to prevent concurrent modification issues.
      Parameters:
      message - The message object to send.
